Our Story

Where Flavor
Meets the Sky

Perched on the third floor of Hotel The Red Pier, Abaar – Kitchen & Bar offers a sensory escape above the winding lanes of Udaipur's legendary Old City. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame the shimmering rooftops and distant Aravalli hills.

Our menu is a celebration of bold flavours and craft cooking — from Korean-glazed chicken wings to slow-cooked Lebanese-style hummus bowls — all served in an atmosphere that is warm, unhurried, and unmistakably Abaar.
